{{Quote|My father broke his oaths. He shamed us all. I do not wish to follow his path… I swore not to follow his path.|[[Brianna]], to [[Meetra Surik]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Yusanis''' was a legendary [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] [[General/Legends|general]], prior to and during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|He was slain by Revan in the Jedi Civil War when Revan sought to destabilize the Echani worlds. Revan succeeded. The fact that our father chose battle is not shameful, but that is not the reason he went to war. He went to war to be with the one he loved, but not the one he had pledged himself to. He was disloyal. I am the mark of that disloyalty.|Brianna, to Meetra Surik|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords" />}}
As famous as he was in melee combat and strategy, Yusanis was just as infamous for fathering his sixth daughter, [[Brianna]], through an illicit affair with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Arren Kae]]. When the affair was brought to light, Arren Kae was exiled from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], and the two of them left to join [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in the [[Mandalorian Wars]].

Their daughter would never know her mother, or even remember her face—Kae was said to have perished in the final battle of the war on [[Malachor V]], yet her body was never recovered.

===Death===
During the [[Jedi Civil War]], Yusanis discovered that the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] had [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] an Echani senator, and challenged Revan to a duel. Despite his great skill in melee combat and use of his [[Yusanis's Brand|finely crafted double-bladed sword]], he was slain by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]].

Yusanis's [[Death/Legends|death]] had a severe impact on the Echani just as Revan had intended; by destabilizing their government, Revan prevented the Echani from seceding from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], keeping the Republic's political and economic infrastructure intact.

===Legacy===
Yusanis's death would be later commemorated by a limited production of personal dueling shields, which boasted superior protection over even the most expensive mass-produced military grade models. Somehow Yusanis's personal blade ended up in the hands of a [[Paaerduag]] merchant on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] by the name of [[Mic'tunan'jus Orgu]], during the Jedi Civil War.
